title: Court Dimensions - Equipment
summary: Defines court lines, dimensions, basket/backboard setup, and required equipment markings.

title: Duties of the Officials
summary: Defines officials' authority, responsibilities, and procedural duties during game administration.

title: Players, Substitutes and Coaches
summary: Governs player participation, substitutions, bench conduct, and related team personnel rules.

title: Definitions
summary: Provides official definitions used across all rules, including control, guarding position, and status states.

title: Scoring and Timing
summary: Covers game timing, period structure, scoring counts, and clock operation standards.

title: Putting Ball in Play - Live/Dead Ball
summary: Explains when the ball becomes live or dead and how play is legally resumed.

title: Shot Clock
summary: Defines 24-second clock operation, resets, and related violations and exceptions.

title: Out-of-Bounds and Throw-In
summary: Specifies when ball/player status is out of bounds and how throw-ins and possession are awarded.

title: Free Throws and Penalties
summary: Covers free throw administration, lane restrictions, and penalty enforcement.

title: Violations and Penalties
summary: Defines non-foul infractions and corresponding penalties, including ball-handling and court violations.

title: Basket Interference - Goaltending
summary: Defines legal/illegal contact with ball or basket in scoring situations.

title: Fouls and Penalties
summary: Defines personal/technical/flagrant categories, illegal contact standards, and foul penalties.

title: Instant Replay
summary: Lists reviewable matters, replay standards, and the process for confirming or overturning calls.

title: Coach's Challenge
summary: Defines coach challenge eligibility, administration, and outcomes after review.
